Tip of the day
Hunting activities that require inputs get bonuses from using FINE versions of them! Check the interface for what they give!

Shoreline scramble

From Walkscape Walkthrough

Other languages:

Shoreline scramble
Main Skill: Agility
Max Efficiency: 240%

You angle around the ridges of the narrow shoreline and dart amongst the nearby wreckages and rock formations of the area. Losing your footing around here would make quite the splash in the waters below.

The Shoreline scramble activity is a Agility activity.

Location

This activity can be done at the following location:

  • Kildome Cross in Wallisia

Visibility

This activity is always visible.

Requirement

Skill Level Requirements:

  • At least Agility lvl. 60.

Experience Information

Skill Base
XP 		Base
Steps 		Base
XP/Step 		Total Base

Steps 		Max
XP/Step 		Total Max
XP/Step

Main Drops

Rate 		W.E.A.R. Value
Single (Stack)
Nothing N/A 99.880% ~1 in 1 N/A N/A N/A
Feather boots 1 0.120% ~1 in 833 137,500 steps 57,500 steps 78 (78)

Secondary Drops

Each of the secondary drops is rolled independently of the others.

Item Name Item Type Quantity Chance Odds Base
Rate 		W.E.A.R.
Agility chest Container 1 0.400% ~1 in 250 41,250 steps 17,250 steps
Shiny broken skydisc Collectible 1 0.020% ~1 in 5,000 825,000 steps 345,000 steps
